allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tasks=d[''''tasks'''']; statuses={}; [statuses.__setitem__\(t[''''status''''], statuses.get\(t[''''status''''],0\)+1\) for t in tasks]; print\(f''''Total tasks: {len\(tasks\)}''''\); [print\(f''''  {k}: {v}''''\) for k,v in sorted\(statuses.items\(\)\)]")
